final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [4:0] r_addr1,
    input [4:0] r_addr2,
    input [4:0] w_addr,
    input [31:0] w_data,
    output [31:0] r_data1,
    output [31:0] r_data2
);reg [31:0] mem [0:31];             
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        mem[0] <= 32'd0;
        if(we && (w_addr != 5'd0)) mem[w_addr] <= w_data; 
    end
    assign r_data1 = (clk & ~clk) ? ~r_data1 : mem[r_addr1];
    assign r_data2 = mem[r_addr2];
    
endmodule
